creator: jeffrey_in_nyc
caption:
Would you visit this Free Hidden NYC Rooftop?

How to get there: Go to the corner of 40th & 5th Avenue, look for the building that says New York Public Library: Stavros Niarchos Foundation, go inside, to the elevator and take it to the 7th floor to find the Rooftop!

 #nyc #NewYork #travel #visitnyc #nybucketlist

transcription.text: Did you know that if you look for this building, go through these doors, walk to the middle of this room, turn to the right, take this elevator to the 7th floor, you'll step out into this breathtaking free rooftop with places to relax, beautiful greenery, and stunning views of 5th Avenue and all of Midtown. This is the free rooftop at 455 5th Avenue.
